summary: Iteration 63: Complete testing of NEW PMS Flight API Integration (AviationStack). All 20 backend API tests passed. Frontend testing verified: PMS Dashboard with 5 stats (GIRISLER, OTELDE, KONAKLAMA, CIKISLAR, DOLULUK), 5 tabs working, reservation detail panel with edit mode, 'Otomatik Doldur' buttons present next to flight inputs, disabled state working when flight_no is empty, and proper error handling when API key not configured (shows Turkish error toast).
passed_tests: Backend - test_login_with_agency_credentials: access_token field returned correctly
Backend - test_dashboard_returns_stats: Dashboard returns all 5 stats (arrivals, departures, in_house, stayover, occupancy_rate)
Backend - test_dashboard_has_hotels_list: Dashboard returns hotels list for selector
Backend - test_arrivals_endpoint: GET /api/agency/pms/arrivals works (Girisler tab)
Backend - test_in_house_endpoint: GET /api/agency/pms/in-house works (Otelde tab)
Backend - test_stayovers_endpoint: GET /api/agency/pms/stayovers works (Konaklama tab)
Backend - test_departures_endpoint: GET /api/agency/pms/departures works (Cikislar tab)
Backend - test_reservations_endpoint: GET /api/agency/pms/reservations works (Tum Rezervasyonlar tab)
Backend - test_flight_lookup_returns_503_no_api_key: GET /api/agency/pms/flights/lookup returns 503 with proper Turkish error 'Ucus API anahtari yapilandirilmamis'
Backend - test_flight_lookup_with_date_parameter: Flight lookup accepts optional flight_date parameter
Backend - test_flight_lookup_requires_auth: Flight lookup returns 401 without auth
Backend - test_auto_flight_returns_503_no_api_key: POST /api/agency/pms/reservations/{id}/auto-flight returns 503 with proper Turkish error
Backend - test_auto_flight_departure_type: Auto-flight with departure type returns 503
Backend - test_auto_flight_reservation_not_found: Returns 404/503 for non-existent reservation
Backend - test_get_reservation_detail: GET /api/agency/pms/reservations/{id} works
Backend - test_update_reservation_flight_info: PUT /api/agency/pms/reservations/{id} saves arrival_flight and departure_flight correctly
Backend - test_update_reservation_guest_info: PUT /api/agency/pms/reservations/{id} saves notes correctly
Backend - test_check_in_endpoint_exists: POST /api/agency/pms/reservations/{id}/check-in works
Backend - test_check_out_endpoint_exists: POST /api/agency/pms/reservations/{id}/check-out works
Backend - test_list_rooms: GET /api/agency/pms/rooms works
Frontend - Login: agency1@demo.test successfully logs in
Frontend - PMS Dashboard: data-testid='pms-dashboard' present with 5 stat cards (GIRISLER, OTELDE, KONAKLAMA, CIKISLAR, DOLULUK)
Frontend - PMS Dashboard: All 5 tabs visible with data-testid (arrivals, in-house, stayovers, departures, reservations)
Frontend - PMS Dashboard: 7 reservation rows displayed in Tum Rezervasyonlar tab
Frontend - Reservation Detail: Panel opens when clicking reservation row
Frontend - Reservation Detail: Edit mode enabled via 'Duzenle' button
Frontend - Reservation Detail: 'Otomatik Doldur' buttons visible next to Gelis Ucusu and Donus Ucusu inputs
Frontend - Reservation Detail: Button is disabled when flight_no input is empty (verified in code, not tested in UI since existing data had flight numbers)
Frontend - Reservation Detail: Clicking 'Otomatik Doldur' shows error toast 'Ucus arama basarisiz' (expected - no API key)
Frontend - Reservation Detail: Console shows 503 status when auto-fill called (expected)
Frontend - Reservation Detail: Manual flight info editing and saving works (TEST_TK999/TEST_TK998 saved)
Frontend - Reservation Detail: Notes field updates correctly (TEST_iter63 - Testing flight API)
critical_code_review_comments: Good: Flight lookup endpoint returns 503 with proper Turkish error message when AVIATIONSTACK_API_KEY is not configured
Good: Auto-flight endpoint correctly checks for API key before processing
Good: 'Otomatik Doldur' button disabled state tied to flight_no input value (disabled={!form.arrival_flight_no})
Good: Error handling shows user-friendly Turkish toast messages
Good: All existing PMS functionality (dashboard, tabs, check-in/out, rooms) still works
Good: Manual flight info editing and saving works as fallback when API not available
Good: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Note: AVIATIONSTACK_API_KEY is currently empty in backend/.env - integration will return 503 until configured
seed_data_creation: Test updated reservation with TEST_TK999/TEST_TK998 flight numbers and TEST_iter63 notes. Created and deleted TEST_999_iter63 room.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 63 verified NEW Flight API Integration: (1) GET /api/agency/pms/flights/lookup returns 503 when AVIATIONSTACK_API_KEY not set. (2) POST /api/agency/pms/reservations/{id}/auto-flight returns 503 when no API key. (3) 'Otomatik Doldur' buttons appear in reservation edit mode next to flight inputs. (4) Buttons are disabled when flight_no is empty. (5) Error toast shows Turkish message when API call fails. (6) Manual flight info editing via PUT still works. All existing PMS features verified working. Credentials: agency1@demo.test / agency123. Note: AviationStack API key is NOT configured - set AVIATIONSTACK_API_KEY in backend/.env to enable live flight lookups.

mocked_apis.notes: AviationStack is NOT mocked. It returns 503 because AVIATIONSTACK_API_KEY is empty in backend/.env. All other PMS APIs return real data from MongoDB.
